mapper.select:
SELECT ln.*, tb.textbook_name AS textbookName, tc.catalog_name AS catalogName FROM learning_notes ln LEFT JOIN textbook tb ON ln.textbook_id = tb.id LEFT JOIN textbook_catalog tc ON ln.catalogue_id = tc.id
AND tb.textbook_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.textbookName}, '%')
AND tc.catalog_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.catalogName}, '%')
AND ln.add_datetime >= #{param.startTime}
AND ln.add_datetime <= #{param.endTime}
ORDER BY ln.add_datetime
ASC
DESC
